2025-26 Philadelphia 76ers Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 45-37, Finished 7th in NBA Eastern Conference

Coach: Nick Nurse (45-37)

Executive: Daryl Morey

PTS/G: 115.9 (14th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 116.1 (19th of 30)

SRS: -0.27 (18th of 30) Pace: 99.4 (15th of 30)

Off Rtg: 115.4 (17th of 30) Def Rtg: 115.5 (16th of 30) Net Rtg: -0.2 (18th of 30)

Expected W-L: 41-41 (18th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +4000, Over-Under 43.5

Arena: Xfinity Mobile Arena Attendance: 778,871 (9th of 30)

NBA 2026 Playoffs:
Won NBA Eastern Conference First Round (4-3) versus Boston Celtics  (Series Stats)
Lost NBA Eastern Conference Semifinals (0-4) versus New York Knicks  (Series Stats)

Value Over Replacement Player

Value over Replacement Player
A box score estimate of the points per 100 TEAM possessions that a player contributed above a replacement-level (-2.0) player, translated to an average team and prorated to an 82-game season.

Multiply by 2.70 to convert to wins over replacement.

An estimate of the percentage of team plays used by a player while they were on the floor.
